DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-18-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: DEFENDANT DEBBIE NGOW'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is sustained with leave to amend to address in good faith all issues raised by demurer. No substantive opposition filed. Plaintiff's attempt to file a second amended complaint without leave of Court is improper per CCP 472 and CCP 430.41. Under the statutory scheme an initial pleading may be amended without leave of court prior to filing of a responsive pleading; or if a demurrer or motion to strike is filed, on or before the opposition due date. Code of Civil Procedure does not allow amendment without leave of Court of previously amended pleadings (Second Amended Complaint); answer to First Amended Complaint by East West Bank is also on file. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (501)
